Launches the QR code scanner camera interface.

Activity with live CameraX preview and real-time QR code detection.

showLotteryLossNotification(Context, String, String) - Static method in class com.example.cmput301_app.entrant.NotificationHelper
Displays an Android system notification informing the entrant that they were not selected in the lottery draw.
showLotteryWinNotification(Context, String, String) - Static method in class com.example.cmput301_app.entrant.NotificationHelper
Displays an Android system notification informing the entrant that they were selected in the lottery draw.
